title: GEAS Implementation Contract
description: Canonical pre-work implementation plan capturing intended change scope and planned actions before main task execution begins.

worker.description: Concrete worker or worker type proposing this implementation plan.

summary.description: Short description of what will change in this task.

rationale.description: Why this change is needed and why this approach is worth taking.

change_scope.description: Concrete files, modules, documents, flows, assets, or surfaces this plan expects to modify.

planned_actions.description: Concrete execution steps specific enough for worker action and reviewer inspection.

non_goals.description: Explicitly excluded work kept outside the task's active implementation scope.
